div.p: Zero-Copy Message Bus — All processes map this same segment
Hardware Reality: All three processes have different virtual addresses mapping to the same physical pages. CPU MMU handles translation. Cache coherence (MESI) ensures writes are visible across cores.

HEADER_SIZE = 0x100 (256B) RING_OFFSET = HEADER_SIZE RING_SIZE = 32 + 8slots + slotsslot_size SCHEMA_OFFSET = RING_OFFSET + RING_SIZE SCHEMA_SIZE = ~8KB (bounded) CLAIM_OFFSET = SCHEMA_OFFSET + SCHEMA_SIZE CLAIM_SIZE = 16 + 64producers + 64consumers TOPIC_OFFSET = CLAIM_OFFSET + CLAIM_SIZE TOPIC_SIZE = ~16KB (bounded) RECOVERY_OFFSET = TOPIC_OFFSET + TOPIC_SIZE TOTAL_SIZE = page_aligned(RECOVERY_OFFSET + 4KB)
